name: HWM_TM_ATRB_FLDS_VL
query: SELECT HWM_TM_ATRB_FLDS_B.TM_ATRB_FLD_ID TM_ATRB_FLD_ID, HWM_TM_ATRB_FLDS_B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, HWM_TM_ATRB_FLDS_B.ENTERPRISE_ID ENTERPRISE_ID, HWM_TM_ATRB_FLDS_B.MODULE_ID MODULE_ID, HWM_TM_ATRB_FLDS_B.TCSMRS_ID TCSMRS_ID, HWM_TM_ATRB_FLDS_B.NAME NAME, HWM_TM_ATRB_FLDS_B.CLASS CLASS, HWM_TM_ATRB_FLDS_B.PARENT_TM_ATRB_FLD_ID PARENT_TM_ATRB_FLD_ID, HWM_TM_ATRB_FLDS_B.GLOBAL_TM_ATRB_FLD_ID GLOBAL_TM_ATRB_FLD_ID, HWM_TM_ATRB_FLDS_B.VALUE_LOCATION VALUE_LOCATION, HWM_TM_ATRB_FLDS_B.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, HWM_TM_ATRB_FLDS_B.ALLOWED_SCOPE ALLOWED_SCOPE, HWM_TM_ATRB_FLDS_B.MANDATORY_FOR_TCSMRS MANDATORY_FOR_TCSMRS, HWM_TM_ATRB_FLDS_TL.DISPLAY_NAME DISPLAY_NAME, HWM_TM_ATRB_FLDS_TL.DESCRIPTION DESCRIPTION, HWM_TM_ATRB_FLDS_B.ATTRIBUTE_TYPE ATTRIBUTE_TYPE, HWM_TM_ATRB_FLDS_B.ATTRIBUTE_GROUP ATTRIBUTE_GROUP, HWM_TM_ATRB_FLDS_B.VALUE_SET_ID VALUE_SET_ID, HWM_TM_ATRB_FLDS_B.COMP_DISP_CODE COMP_DISP_CODE, HWM_TM_ATRB_FLDS_B.BASE_UNIT, HWM_TM_ATRB_FLDS_B.UOM_TYPE, HWM_TM_ATRB_FLDS_B.UOM_BEHAVIOR, HWM_TM_ATRB_FLDS_B.UOM_UNIT, HWM_TM_ATRB_FLDS_B.UOM_CODE, HWM_TM_ATRB_FLDS_B.CREATED_BY CREATED_BY, HWM_TM_ATRB_FLDS_B.CREATION_DATE CREATION_DATE, HWM_TM_ATRB_FLDS_B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE LAST_UPDATE_DATE, HWM_TM_ATRB_FLDS_B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, HWM_TM_ATRB_FLDS_B.LAST_UPDATED_BY LAST_UPDATED_BY, HWM_TM_ATRB_FLDS_B.SGUID SGUID, HWM_TM_ATRB_FLDS_B.STORAGE_TYPE FROM HWM_TM_ATRB_FLDS_B, HWM_TM_ATRB_FLDS_TL WHERE HWM_TM_ATRB_FLDS_B.TM_ATRB_FLD_ID = HWM_TM_ATRB_FLDS_TL.TM_ATRB_FLD_ID AND HWM_TM_ATRB_FLDS_TL.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
